description: Pods and Containers - The Smallest Deployable Unit in Kubernetes
summary: Pods and Containers - The Smallest Deployable Unit in Kubernetes
target_audience: Absolute beginners to Kubernetes who have a basic familiarity with containers and Docker

lectures.title: Pods and Containers - The Smallest Deployable Unit in Kubernetes
objectives: Understand what a Pod is and how it differs from a container
Know the Pod lifecycle and single- vs. multi-container patterns
Create a Pod and inspect its status using kubectl
